title: Norelco 7886XL Quadra Action Dry Razor Shaver Corded Cordless, 7886 XL Brand new

variation_files.prompt: A close-up product shot of the electric shaver positioned diagonally, with its shaving head facing downward and slightly angled toward the viewer. The shaver is shown under a running chrome faucet, with a clear, dynamic stream of water pouring directly onto its exposed shaving head, creating a splash of water droplets and ripples around the base. The background is plain white, emphasizing the product and the water action. The lighting is bright and studio-like, highlighting the reflective surfaces of the faucet and the water, while the shaver’s body appears smooth and metallic. The composition focuses on the wet cleaning or rinsing action, suggesting ease of maintenance and water resistance.

A product shot featuring the electric shaver positioned on the right side of the frame, angled slightly toward the viewer, with its three circular shaving heads clearly visible at the top. To the left of the shaver, a soft, gray fabric travel pouch is displayed, lying flat with a rounded flap closure and a small, rectangular brand plaque centered on the flap. The pouch is slightly overlapping the shaver’s base. The entire composition is set against a plain white background, with soft, even lighting that highlights the contours of both the shaver and the pouch without casting harsh shadows. The arrangement suggests a clean, minimalist product presentation, emphasizing portability and design.
